svg.aria-label: Indicator coverage by sector: repo-local vs Teams deposit vs SDMX-published
svg.title: Indicator coverage by sector: repo-local vs Teams deposit vs SDMX-published
svg.desc: Grouped bar chart; the gap from the local bar to the SDMX bar is the count of published indicators not yet replicated locally.
